title: Partners Group acquires SureWerx from The Riverside Company
content:
## Partners Group acquires SureWerx from The Riverside Company
On December 28, 2022, Partners Group (USA) Inc. ("Partners Group") completed, on behalf of its clients, the acquisition of SureWerx from The Riverside Company. The acquisition aligns with Partners Group's thematic focus on industrial safety and will help solidify SureWerx's market leading position by adding complementary new products and brands to its well established networks of distributors and end-users.
Partners Group (USA) Inc. is a leading global private markets firm based in New York.
SureWerx, co-headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia and Chicago, Illinois, is a leading supplier of personal protective equipment, safety gear, and tool solutions across North America.
McCarthy Tétrault advised Partners Group (USA) Inc. with a team led by Jonathan See and Jake Irwin that included Michael Alty, Rebecca Ferguson, Aman Gill (Corporate), Ian Mak, Zachary Masoud, Oana Chivaran, Zach Kroll (Financial Services), Donovan Plomp, Ben Ratelband, Benjamin Aberant, Abby Nann, Nicole Deniset, Alexander Steele (Labour & Employment), Jason Gudofsky, Erin Keogh, Will Rooney (Antitrust & Foreign Investment), Raj Juneja, Brendan Festeryga (Tax), Craig Shirreff, Thomas Fox (Real Property & Planning), Sam Rogers, Jill Yates, Connor Bildfell (Litigation), Kelleher Lynch, Julia Miller (Pensions, Benefits and Executive Compensation), Joanna Rosengarten (Environment), John Boscariol, Gajan Sathananthan (International Trade & Investment), Michael Scherman, Jamie Parker (Privacy & Data), and Vincent Yip (Intellectual Property).
